text.title: Verbatim To Backlog Pattern Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Verbatim To Backlog Pattern.

example.scenario: Weekly run: 47 touchpoints → 12 pain statements → 4 clusters → 4 cards. Top card: 'When I'm onboarding, I want to skip credit card, so I can test the free tier' (RICE 142, 5 quotes attached).
